Info_Detail: Artist: May J | Released: 2017 | Album: Futuristic
Deskripsi: HERO is an insert theme used in Ultraman Orb: The Chronicle. It was first released in May J.'s eight album, Futuristic, on October 25, 2017,[1] then again with "Kizuna∞Infinity" on March 7, 2018.[2]

Info_Detail: Artist: Ichiro Mizuki and Voyager | Released: 2017 | Album: GO AHEAD ~Susume! Ultraman Zero~
Deskripsi: GO AHEAD ~Susume! Ultraman Zero~ (GO AHEAD ~すすめ! ウルトラマンゼロ~, Gō Aheddo ~Susume! Urutoraman Zero~, lit. "Go Ahead ~Let's Go! Ultraman Zero~") is the opening theme for Ultraman Zero: The Chronicle. It acts as an updated version of Susume! Ultraman Zero.

Info_Detail: Artist: Voyager | Released: 2017 | Album: Ultraman Geed with Voyager
Deskripsi: Fusion Rise! (フュージョンライズ!, Fyūjon Raizu!) is an insert theme that debuted in Ultraman Festival 2017 Live Stage Part 1. It was later used in episode 15 of Ultraman Geed. The song was included in Ultraman Festival Live Stage Song Collection 2009-2019.
